MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2014 Continued To Jan-20-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Respondent Laurie A. Vollens Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial Date; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Donna Brorby And Geraldine Sander; Stipulation; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Oct-02-2014 Text Ruling

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Chambers for Phoebe Liles-Wilkin. Donna Brorby appearing for the Law Office of Helen Marsh representing Lola Vollen (also present).

Counsel reported that mediation was unsuccessful. The Petition for Order Directing Conveyance of Assets to Trust, etc. was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial, (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Continued To Jun-09-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Continued To May-12-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Chambers for Oonagh Connolly and Phoebe Wilkin (Successor Trustee). Donna Brorby for Laurie Vollen (Respondent).

Mr. Chambers stated that he has resignation and acceptance papers signed for appointment of Ms. Wilkins as Successor Trustee and explained that Ms. Delaney is having capacity issues. Ms. Drorby stated that they have not achieved completion of discovery, that they have exchanged settlement documents, that it appears they are very far apart and that discovery responses are due back this week. Mr. Chambers also stated that the deposition of the respondent is needed and that 30-days are also needed for appointment of the Successor Trustee. The Petition for Order Directing Conveyance of Assets to Trust, etc. was continued to May 12, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for trial setting. The Court stated that discovery notices need to go out immediately, that the Parties can continue to work on settlement and that it expects everything to get done by then. The Parties are to discuss the length of trial to determine if the matter will remain in probate or get sent out to Dept. 206.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Feb-03-2014 Continued To Apr-07-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Chambers for Oonagh Connolly. Donna Brorby for Helen Marsh.

The Court stated that the issue is still whether Ms. Vollen is a Caretaker or a Cohabitant and asked if the Parties are ready to go to trial. Counsel reported that some discovery still needs to be conducted, that they have made settlement offers and that they need more time. The Petition for Order Directing Conveyance of Assets to Trust, etc. was continued to April 7, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that discovery will be completed, and that either the case is resolved or will be set for trial.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Continued To Feb-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Timothy Chambers Oonagh Delaney Connolly (Petitioner). Donna Brosby appearing for Helen Marsh for Laurie Vollen (Respondent).

Mr. Chambers stated that discovery is not completed and that it is moving along. The Petition for Order Directing Conveyance of Assets to Trusst, etc. was continued to February 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status re setting for trial.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Continued To Nov-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Chambers for Petitioner. James Barringer for Laurie Vollen.

Counsel reported that they are in the midst of dicsovery and that they have made progress. The Petition for Order Directing Conveyance of Assets to Trust was continued to November 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on discovery.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris. (Not Reported)

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Continued To Aug-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Chambers for Oonagh Connolly. James Barringer for and with Laurie Vollen.

Mr. Barringer stated that the matter did not settle, that they will need an evidentiary hearing, that discovery is needed and that they do not know if they can do the evidentiary hearing in two half days. The Petition for Order Directing Conveyance of Assets to Trust, etc. was continued to August 26, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on discovery.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Apr-29-2013 Continued To Jun-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for Laurie Vollen. Michael Yongue for Oonagh Connolly.

Mr. Barringer stated that they had mediation adn they they are going back and forth with offers and counter offers. Mr. Barringer also explained that there is a delay in filing of the inventory and apppraisal because his client had to move the artwork, that the artwork needs to be photographed, that it is currently in storage and that he anticipates it being done by May 15, 2013. Mr. Yongue understands the need for more time. The petition was continued to June 24, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Continued To Apr-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Continued To Mar-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Continued To Feb-25-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Chambers for Petitioner. James Barringer for Laurie Vollen.

Counsel reported that they had mediation on December 5, 2012, that they got close to settlement during mediation, that the Petitioner presented proposed terms of the settlement, that a counter offer was submitted on December 26, 2012 and that they are awaiting further responses. Counsel also stated that the Mediator is still available to them if needed and requested a 30-day continuance. The Petition for Order Directing Conveyance of Assets to Trust, etc. was continued to February 25, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on resolution of the dispute.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Nov-05-2012 Continued To Jan-14-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Barringer for and with Lola Vollen. Timothy Chambers for Oonagh Connolly.

Mr. Chambers stated that he has completed waivers which are to be filed today. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than December 31, 2012. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by January 7, 2013. The Petition for Order Directing Conveyance of Assets to Trust, etc. was continued to and the Parties are to return on January 14, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Continued To Nov-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Continued To Oct-22-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Chambers for Oonagh Connolly (Petitioner/Trustee). James Barringer for Laurie Vollen (Respondent).

Mr. Chambers stated that he has a Proof of Service with respect to the three Daughters and that he will file it today. In addition, Mr. Chambers stated that he can file a declaration from the Daughters indicating that they are in support of the petition, that Counsel think they can reach resolution and asked about Pro Bono Mediation. Mr. Barringer suggested Counsel have more discussion first. The Petition for Order Directing Conveyance of Assets to Trust, etc. was continued to October 22, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Proof of Service is to have beed filed by then. The Parties are to talk to each other with regard to getting the matter resolved, doing mediation or determining what route they need to take to get the matter resolved.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Pet. For Order Directing Conveyance Of Assets To Trust, For Determination That Respondent L.A. Vollen Is A Prohibited Bene. Pursant To Pc Sec. 21350,
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Continued To Sep-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Chambers for Oonagh Delaney Connolly (Trustee). Laurie Vollen (Respondent) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Chambers stated that the three Children of the Decedent were working in cooperation with the Trustee and agreed that they need notice. The Court indicated what it's thoughts are with respect to the petition. Ms. Vollen requested more time to file an opposition with the assistance of an Attorney. The Petition for Order Directing Conveyance of Assets to Trust, etc. was continued to September 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Chambers to provide proper notice of the petition and for Ms. Vollen to choose what form of opposition to file.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
